comments.optionalDependencies: Cloud drivers for artifact bytes (TMUX_MOBILE_ARTIFACT_STORAGE=gcs|s3) and the pin index (TMUX_MOBILE_PIN_INDEX=firestore). Optional so the local default still installs and boots with zero cloud infra; lib/artifact-storage.mjs and lib/pin-index.mjs import them lazily and fall back if absent.
